description: As an administrator (username: admin, password: Admin1234!), configure the 'Nursing Fundamentals' (NUR301) course with custom grade letter boundaries to match the nursing program's strict grading scale. Override the site defaults using the following boundaries: A (93%), A- (90%), B+ (87%), B (83%), B- (80%), C+ (77%), C (73%), C- (70%), D (60%), and F (0%).
